overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand gothic dining hall at night, featuring floating candles, long house tables filled with students, and large stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady elevated view of the atmospheric interior reminiscent of a historic castle or magical school.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from an elevated position overlooking the tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air providing warm magical illumination throughout the hall
tall gothic arched windows with blue stained glass revealing the dark night sky outside
lengthy wooden house tables lined with students and lit candelabras running the length of the hall
ancient stone block walls with mounted torches and decorative tapestries
large stone fireplace with burning fire adding to the warm ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles and fireplace light. Students sit densely packed at long wooden house tables eating and conversing, while massive stained glass windows line the right wall revealing the dark night outside. The atmosphere is warm, magical, and bustling with quiet activity throughout the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady elevated perspective of a magnificent gothic dining hall, capturing a scene of warm, magical bustle. It begins by surveying the vast interior, where hundreds of floating candles and the glow of fireplaces illuminate the space. As the camera holds its position, the view encompasses students densely packed at long wooden house tables, engaged in eating and quiet conversation. The scene then expands to reveal massive stained glass windows lining the right wall, which contrast the interior warmth with the deep darkness of the night outside.
